title: Add Tableau Dashboard and Power BI Import Icons to Add Metrics Flow
story: As a data analyst, I want icons for importing from Tableau Dashboard and Power BI in the Add Metrics flow, so that I can import metrics from multiple analytics platforms.
description: Add CSS-classed icons for Tableau Dashboard and Power BI imports in the Add Metrics workflow. Classes: `import_from_tableau_dashboard` and `import_from_power_bi`.
acceptance_criteria: Tableau Dashboard import icon with class `import_from_tableau_dashboard` is visible
Power BI import icon with class `import_from_power_bi` is visible
Icons are clickable and trigger the appropriate import flow
ux_changes: Added Tableau Dashboard and Power BI import icons to the Add Metrics flow.
comment_summary: Developer asked about the Power BI import scope, then implemented both icons on development.
